text.message: Why help him get the settle lol
For one brick u gave out an important poking
U could’ve let me fight him
I don’t realize I could also go up white. Would’ve left you that spot
lol that white. Didn’t see you accepted
No u r acting nonstop here
Blue would’ve got a city had to slow him he gets lr with one road
Bot playing better he wouldn’t have given u that trade
I had to waste my mono and u help him city lmao
I stole from u cuz I didn’t want to steal ore as he had ores and i would mono
Early monos don’t work very often
But had to slow the city down
But red gifted it to him
Blue should also get longest road
I can’t. Y’all robbing me lol
I’m a long way from a win
I can never take it looool
These personal plays ruin the game u would’ve gotten army that’s why I had to waste my card
I needed a knight back up
That was just unnecessary to steal from me
U win with that trade hahahaha
U already have a point in hand
